subcodes.first_line: The Beloved of all existence declareth in utterance that a single word of the Divine Word in that Most Great Manifestation surpasseth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: محبوب امکان در بیان میفرماید یک کلمه از کلمه الهیه در آن ظهور اعظم بهتر است از
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @superiority; incomparability of the Word of God, @the Bayan, its laws and their abrogation, @thankfulness; gratitude, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
